fullText: JUST IN: 𝕏 account of the Iranian Embassy requests that Trump change his Tuesday deadline — "8 P.M. is not that good. Could you change it to between 1 and 2 P.M., or if possible, 1 and 2 A.M.?"

fullText: BREAKING: Iran has allowed a French container ship to cross the Strait of Hormuz while more than 1,000 other ships remain waiting.

name: OpenBuild
fullText:
Compute to AI. Consensus back to humans.
AI is no longer just a tool, it’s becoming an executor.
From browser-operating agents to on-chain AI making transactions, the Agent Economy is already taking shape.

So what happens when:
AI handles execution,
and humans focus on strategy https://t.co/XVUU3rLjWP
